mapper.select: SELECT u.*, o.organization_no AS org_no, o.organization_id AS org_id, o.organization_name AS org_name, o.description AS org_desc, p.permission_no AS perm_no, p.permission_id AS perm_id FROM t_control_user u LEFT JOIN t_control_user_group_role ugr ON u.userno = ugr.fk_user_no LEFT JOIN t_control_group g ON ugr.fk_group_no = g.id LEFT JOIN t_control_group_organization go ON g.id = go.fk_groupno LEFT JOIN t_control_organization o ON go.fk_organizationno = o.organization_no AND o.valid = 'Y' LEFT JOIN t_control_role_permission rp ON ugr.fk_role_no = rp.fk_role_no LEFT JOIN t_control_permission p ON rp.fk_permission_no = p.permission_no WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.type != 'Administrator'
mapper.update:
update t_control_user set lock_status = #{lock_status},
lock_time = now()
failure_count = 0
userid = #{userid}
UPDATE t_control_user SET password = #{password}, expiration_time = now() WHERE userid = #{userid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_control_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_control_user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_control_user ( userid, username, password, displayname, email, type, creationtime, updatetime, lock_status, failure_count ) VALUES ( #{userid}, #{username}, #{password}, #{displayname}, #{email}, 'User', now(), now(), 'N', 0 )
INSERT INTO t_control_user_group_role (fk_user_no, fk_group_no, fk_role_no) VALUES (#{userNo}, 1, 1)
